messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0174",
  "title": "2025年度中国卓越服务企业",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 2025年度中国卓越服务企业

2025 China's Outstanding Solution Providers

*排名不分先后

message.content:
This section functions as a bilingual title and introductory note for a recognition list. It can answer retrieval questions regarding:
- **Topic & Date:** Identifies the subject as the 2025 annual recognition of top Chinese solution providers.
- **Entities:** Specifies the entity type as Chinese solution providers (individual company names are not provided in this snippet).
- **Claims & Formatting:** Explicitly states that the subsequent list is presented in no particular order ("排名不分先后").
- **Definitions/Translations:** Provides the official English title: "2025 China's Outstanding Solution Providers."
- **Procedures, Tables, Figures, Metrics, Evidence:** None are present; the text serves solely as a header for a forthcoming list or table.
This section is best used to verify the award year, confirm the unranked presentation format of the provider list, and locate the corresponding English title.

response_text:
This section functions as a bilingual title and introductory note for a recognition list. It can answer retrieval questions regarding:
- **Topic & Date:** Identifies the subject as the 2025 annual recognition of top Chinese solution providers.
- **Entities:** Specifies the entity type as Chinese solution providers (individual company names are not provided in this snippet).
- **Claims & Formatting:** Explicitly states that the subsequent list is presented in no particular order ("排名不分先后").
- **Definitions/Translations:** Provides the official English title: "2025 China's Outstanding Solution Providers."
- **Procedures, Tables, Figures, Metrics, Evidence:** None are present; the text serves solely as a header for a forthcoming list or table.
This section is best used to verify the award year, confirm the unranked presentation format of the provider list, and locate the corresponding English title.
